WhyItMatters: Validates whether Defender XDR and Advanced Hunting are producing raw endpoint evidence before interpretation.
ReviewSteps: Confirm Graph security alerts_v2 returned alerts.
Confirm Advanced Hunting AlertInfo returned rows.
Confirm AlertEvidence has device or file evidence.
If all sources are empty after EICAR, validate Defender onboarding, RBAC, Graph scopes, and table availability.
ExpectedResults: Rows should appear when Defender alerts or EICAR detections are present and accessible.
NoResultsMeaning: No rows means either no recent signal was available or required licensing, role access, or telemetry is unavailable.
RecommendedActions: Check Defender portal for EICAR alert.
Validate ThreatHunting.Read.All and Defender XDR role access.
